manual.description: No LLM provider. Use MEMIA as a local operating system with templates and CLI.

claude.description: Claude adapter. Provide credentials through the local environment.

cursor.description: Cursor adapter for codebase work. Uses the user's local Cursor setup.

codex.description: Codex adapter for development workflows. Uses the user's local Codex setup.

opencode.description: OpenCode adapter. Install and configure separately, then provide credentials locally.
